creator: villa.alberto@gmail.com
text:
update libavformat/avidec.c to avoid a crash in inigo, the MLT renderer used by multimedia/kdenlive-kde4[-devel] (just submitted)
the patch has been taken from a new svn version of ffmpeg, so it's code made in ffmpeg and just works

Fix: here is the patch

new files: files/patch-libavformat-avidec.c

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: import a clip in kdenlive and sometimes this will result in a crash
